stemHtml: When an aircraft experiences electrical load shedding, what action takes place at the bus bar level?

options.a: Non-essential consumers are automatically disconnected from the bus bar to reduce electrical load.
options.b: The bus bar increases its voltage output to compensate for insufficient generator power.
options.c: The bus bar discharges stored electrical energy to maintain system stability.
options.d: Electric charges are redistributed equally between all bus bars to balance the load.
